reviews.comment:
Esta YPF ACA, es mágica! No sé, es distinta. Probablemente hay muchas gasolineras en arrecifes y en los alrededores, pero siempre sigo un poco más para llegar acá, es la recompensa. Instalaciones cómo una YPF ACA, baños impecables, shop completo, combustible YPF, parque recreativo, mesas, sillas, parrilla. Pero el lugar y su magia sólo acá, en ésta YPF.  Los empleados siempre me trataron bien y el dueño, sólo sé que es de San Lorenzo (conversé una vez 😅)  a veces solo paro unos minutos para tomar mates y mirar el campo, o cómo el sol se pierde en el horizonte. Me llena de energía y me reconforta cada vez. Suerte de tener este lugar en mi camino! Recomiendo visitarlo.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF ACA is magical! I don't know, it's different. There are probably many gas stations in Arrecifes and the surrounding area, but I always go a little further to get here; it's the reward. It has facilities like a YPF ACA: spotless restrooms, a full shop, YPF fuel, a recreation area, tables, chairs, and a grill. But the place and its magic are only found here, at this YPF. The employees have always treated me well, and the owner—I only know he's from San Lorenzo (I spoke with him once 😅)—sometimes I just stop for a few minutes to drink mate and look at the countryside, or how the sun disappears on the horizon. It fills me with energy and comforts me every time. I'm lucky to have this place on my route! I highly recommend visiting it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCLThxY0FREAE

reviews.comment:
Si bien es pequeña cuenta con un excelente servicio.
El shop está muy completo, variado y con productos muy buenos.
Los baños están muy limpios. Además cuenta con compresor para inflar y controlar las cubiertas, agua caliente gratis y un lugar al aire libre con mesas donde se puede descansar.
Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Although small, it offers excellent service.
The shop is very well-stocked, varied, and has great products.
The restrooms are very clean. It also has a compressor for inflating and checking tires, free hot water, and an outdoor area with tables where you can relax. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaGVIOHd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pare una hora, La Paz total.  Faltaría ducha. Y buen, cobraría más el café, pero daría la cantidad que dan en todo el mundo.(7 cucharaditas y terminó mi café.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for an hour, total peace and quiet. A shower would be nice. And well, they'd charge more for coffee, but they'd give the same amount as everywhere else in the world. (7 teaspoons and I finished my coffee.)
